notes.management_roles: Human roles allowed to manage or approve role structure changes.
notes.bot_accounts: Roles owned by bot accounts. High permissions here are expected but should be isolated.
notes.bot_roles: Server-defined roles intended for bot/system behavior, not human hierarchy.
